storytelling.headline: I tell stories at tables, not just in standups.
storytelling.body: When I'm not running engineering teams, I'm usually running tabletop adventures. Designing scenarios is the same skill as designing software: model a system of constraints, anticipate how people will push against them, and build the affordances that make the experience land. Replace this paragraph with what you actually want to say.

roleplaying.headline: Tabletop roleplaying — for over [N] years.
roleplaying.body: Replace this with the systems you've played and run (D&D, Call of Cthulhu, your own homebrew, whatever), what draws you to the hobby, and what it's taught you about collaboration, improvisation, and reading a room. This is a placeholder to be filled in.
